zh.Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germ: 德國薩阿藍德可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie von Saarbrücken於大約1145年出生在德國薩阿藍德可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯時，她的父親Simon I. von Saarbrücken27歲，母親Mechthild von Sponheim22歲。她於1165年與Hendrik III van Limburg在荷蘭利包格可可拉德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1214年在比利時利艾利布格享年70歲，埋葬在荷蘭利包格可可拉德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophie von Saarbrücken于大约1145年出生在德国薩阿藍德可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯时，她的父亲Simon I. von Saarbrücken27岁，母亲Mechthild von Sponheim22岁。她于1165年与Hendrik III van Limburg在荷兰利包格可可拉德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1214年在比利时利艾利布格享年70岁，埋葬在荷兰利包格可可拉德。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie von Saarbrücken was born about 1145, in Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germany, her father, Simon I. von Saarbrücken, was 27 and her mother, Mechthild von Sponheim, was 22. She married Hendrik III van Limburg in 1165, in Kerkrade, Limburg, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1214, in Limbourg, Liège, Belgium, at the age of 70, and was buried in Kerkrade, Limburg, Netherlands.

fr.Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germ: Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie von Saarbrücken est née environ 1145, à Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, La Sarre, Allemagne, son père, Simon I. von Saarbrücken, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mechthild von Sponheim, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Hendrik III van Limburg en 1165, à Kerkrade, Limbourg, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1214, à Limbourg, Liège, Belgique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Kerkrade, Limbourg, Pays-Bas.

de.Limburg, Duché de Limburg, Holy Roman Em: Limburg (Lahn), Kurfürstentum Trier, Heiliges Römisches Reich
de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie von Saarbrücken um 1145 in Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon I. von Saarbrücken 27 und ihre Mutter Mechthild von Sponheim 22. Sie hat 1165 in Kerkrade, Limburg, Niederlande Hendrik III van Limburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1214 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Limbourg, Lüttich, Belgien und wurde in Kerkrade, Limburg, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Saarbrücken è nata il circa 1145 nel Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germania, sua padre, Simon I. von Saarbrücken, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mechthild von Sponheim, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Hendrik III van Limburg nel 1165, nel Kerkrade, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1214, nel Limbourg, Liegi, Belgio, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Kerkrade, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophie von Saarbrückenが約1145年にドイツサアルランドクレイス サアルブルuクンサアルブルuクンで生まれた時，父Simon I. von Saarbrückenは27歳，母Mechthild von Sponheimは22歳であった。1165年にオランダリンブルグケルクラドでHendrik III van Limburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1214年にベルギーリeッジリンボウルグで70歳で死去し，オランダリンブルグケルクラドにて埋葬された。

ko.Limburg, Duché de Limburg, Holy Roman Em: 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 커프u르스투 트리어 림버그 (라h)
ko.lifeSummary: Sophie von Saarbrücken(이)가 대략 1145년 독일 사알랜드 크레이스 사아르브uc켄 사아르브uc켄에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon I. von Saarbrücken(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mechthild von Sponheim(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1165년 네덜란드 림버그 커크라드에서 Hendrik III van Limburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1214년 벨기에 리e지 림보우르그에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 림버그 커크라드에 묻혔다.

pt.Limburg, Duché de Limburg, Holy Roman Em: Limburg (Lahn), Kurfürstentum Trier, Heiliges Römisches Reich
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Saarbrücken nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Alemanha, seu pai, Simon I. von Saarbrücken, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mechthild von Sponheim, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Hendrik III van Limburg em 1165, em Kerkrade, Limburgo, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1214, em Limbourg, Liège, Bélgica, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Kerkrade, Limburgo, Países Baixos.

ru.Limburg, Duché de Limburg, Holy Roman Em: лимбург (лахн), курфuрстентум триир, хилигесь рoмищесь раич
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie von Saarbrücken родилась около 1145 г. в местности саарбрuккен, крис саарбрuккен, саарланд, Германия, её отцу по имени Simon I. von Saarbrücken было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechthild von Sponheim, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hendrik III van Limburg в 1165 г. в местности киркрад, лимбург, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1214 г. в местности лимбург, лиeдж, Бельгия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности киркрад, лимбург, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophie von Saarbrücken nació aproximadamente 1145, en Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Alemania, su papá, Simon I. von Saarbrücken, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mechthild von Sponheim, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Hendrik III van Limburg en 1165, en Kerkrade, Limburg, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1214, en Limbourg, Lieja, Bélgica, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Kerkrade, Limburg, Países Bajos.
